title: thelypteris pyrrhorhachis subsp. distans
intro: Thelypteris pyrrhorhachis subsp. distans is a fern species native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Thelypteris pyrrhorhachis subsp. distans include its potential to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in traditional herbal medicine preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
